title: ranunculus villarsii subsp. brachylobus
intro: Ranunculus villarsii subsp. brachylobus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Ranunculus villarsii subsp. brachylobus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in salves, tinctures, and other topical applications.
